name: Lawnmower Game Racing 2: Drunken
short_description: Sequel to lawnmower racing game. Drive now against stupid ai opponents in this world slowest racing game. Try to finish tracks and collect achievements
detailed_description:
Story:

Player control lawnmower in this survival racing game. 15 different themed levels. All has 60 seconds time to find coin and finish level and collect steam achievements. So can be you to be enough fast lawnmower driver and finish all levels in this awesome racing game

Features:

- 4 different mowers to drive. Select lawnmower which want driver
- Amazing 15 tracks
- End of every track there is  bottle, which gives steam achievements
- 3 different ai opponents

Controls:

- WASD =Movement
- Space = Handbrake
- Escape = back to menu select from tracks/levels
